description: Build QuantMeet frontend - complete Next.js app with pre-join lobby, video grid, control bar, chat sidebar, participant list, meeting ended screen. Uses existing src/types/components.ts prop types.
steps: Update apps/quantmeet/package.json: add next, react, react-dom, @tanstack/react-query, @quant/shared-ui (workspace:*), @quant/common (workspace:*) to dependencies. Add @types/react, @types/react-dom, autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss to devDependencies. Update scripts to: dev='next dev --port 3007', build='next build', start='next start', typecheck='tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json'. Add a new tsconfig.backend.json that only includes backend/**/*.ts (current tsconfig.json becomes the frontend one). The existing tsconfig.json must be replaced with Next.js config.

Create apps/quantmeet/tsconfig.backend.json: compilerOptions (target ES2022, module ESNext, moduleResolution bundler, strict, noEmit, skipLibCheck, paths for @quant/ai, @quant/queue, @quant/storage, @quant/auth, @quant/common, @quant/server-core), include=['backend/**/*.ts','src/types/**/*.ts'], exclude=['node_modules']

Replace apps/quantmeet/tsconfig.json with Next.js-compatible config (pattern from quantmail, include next-env.d.ts and src/**/*.ts and src/**/*.tsx and .next/types/**/*.ts, paths for @quant/shared-ui and @quant/common)
Create apps/quantmeet/next.config.mjs: transpilePackages=['@quant/shared-ui','@quant/common'], output='standalone'
Create apps/quantmeet/tailwind.config.ts (same pattern)
Create apps/quantmeet/postcss.config.mjs (same pattern)
Create apps/quantmeet/src/app/globals.css
Create apps/quantmeet/src/app/layout.tsx with Inter font, metadata title='QuantMeet', QueryProvider
Create apps/quantmeet/src/app/error.tsx
Create apps/quantmeet/src/app/loading.tsx
Create apps/quantmeet/src/providers/query-provider.tsx
Create apps/quantmeet/src/hooks/useMeeting.ts - useQuery hook for meeting state
Create apps/quantmeet/src/hooks/useParticipants.ts - useQuery hook for participants list
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/PreJoinLobby.tsx - camera/mic preview with device picker, display name input, join button. Use DevicePicker concepts but implement own UI
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/VideoTile.tsx - single participant video tile implementing VideoTileProps from src/types/components.ts
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/ParticipantGrid.tsx - grid of VideoTiles with layout modes (grid/speaker/sidebar) implementing ParticipantGridProps
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/ControlBar.tsx - meeting controls (mute/camera/screenshare/record/leave/chat/transcript) implementing ControlBarProps
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/ChatPanel.tsx - in-meeting chat panel implementing ChatPanelProps
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/ParticipantList.tsx - list of participants with audio/video status indicators
Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/MeetingEnded.tsx - post-meeting screen with summary, option to rejoin or go home
Create apps/quantmeet/src/app/page.tsx - landing page for creating/joining meetings. Shows a join form with meeting ID input and create meeting button

Create apps/quantmeet/src/app/meeting/[id]/page.tsx - the in-meeting page. Shows PreJoinLobby first, then after join shows ParticipantGrid + ControlBar + toggleable ChatPanel/ParticipantList. When meeting ends shows MeetingEnded.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes including @quant/quantmeet typecheck task (now runs tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json)
pnpm build passes including @quant/quantmeet next build
Components implement the prop types from src/types/components.ts where applicable
No inline mock data - useQuery hooks only
